summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Fesa Global recruitment website. All major features working correctly including navigation, hero section with rotating globe, testimonials marquee, Share Your Story modal, contact forms, WhatsApp integration, and mobile responsiveness.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal close button has overlay interception issues on mobile
ui_bugs.workaround: Modal functionality works fine, just close button has minor click issues

passed_tests: Navigation centered with all required items (Home, Services, Regions, About, Stories, Get Started)
Hero section displays rotating globe with FESA GLOBAL text below
Testimonials marquee scrolls continuously with sample testimonials
Share Your Story button opens modal form successfully
Story submission form works with all fields (name, role, location, story, photo upload)
CTA section has Book Free Consultation and Contact Form buttons
Contact form fields work (name, email, phone, message)
WhatsApp buttons work (2 found: Book Free Consultation and Message on WhatsApp)
All navigation links scroll to correct sections (Services, Regions, About, Stories, Home)
Mobile navigation menu opens and closes properly
Form submissions work on both desktop and mobile
success_percentage: frontend: 95% (1 minor UI issue out of 13 major features tested)
